title: ee.mesh.hello.response.v1
description: Hello-handshake success response emitted by the SRR6.46.12 responder when the SRR6.46.7 discovery policy grants consent. Payload ≤ 4096 bytes (frame budget enforced by the SRR6.9 transport).

requestId.description: Echoed from the request for caller-side correlation.

responderNodeKey.description: Stable tailscale node identifier of the responder. Redactable under the `tailscale_metadata` class.

responderWorkspaceIds.description: Workspace-ids the responder serves. SRR6.46.2 keeps peers in `eeCapablePeers[]` only when this set intersects the caller's `requesterWorkspaceIds`.

responderAdvertisedTags.description: Optional: tailscale ACL tags the responder advertises (e.g. `tag:ee-mesh`). Informational; SRR6.46.7 admission decisions are already made by the time this response is sent.

discoveryConsent.description: Always `true` in a success response (the responder grants consent by responding at all). The field is kept for symmetry with the decline-path `ee.mesh.hello.error.v1` which carries `discoveryConsent: false`.

responseElapsedMicros.description: Microseconds the responder spent producing this response. Informational; useful for caller-side performance tuning.
